title: Jobinia mazzuchii
taxonomy: Jobinia mazzuchii is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to Brazil. The plant is classified as a part of the genus Jobinia. Jobinia mazzuchii is further classified as a species within the family Fabaceae and the order Fabales. Further specific classification details are not readily available.
